channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Guardian nominated for more than 20 honours at 2026 Press Awards
item.description: Twenty-seven entries shortlisted in 21 categories including website of the year and newspaper of the year The Guardian has been nominated for more tha...

item.title: Minister and Burnham escalate row with ‘hypocritical’ Ratcliffe over claim UK colonised by immigrants – politics live
item.description: Labour mayor of Greater Manchester joins those criticising Ratcliffe over his comments Here is video of Jim Ratcliffe making his comment about the UK ...

item.title: Six Republicans join Democrats in vote to block Donald Trump’s Canada tariffs - US politics live
item.description: President warned prior to the vote that any Republican who voted against tariffs would ‘suffer the consequences’ The House on Wednesday passed the Sav...

item.title: ‘Utterly evil’: Louisiana pastor sentenced to seven years’ prison for molesting teen girl
item.description: Milton Otto Martin III received maximum sentence for indecent behavior inflicted on teenager 15 years ago The Louisiana Pentecostal pastor who repeate...

item.title: Europe should stop sending money to Ukraine to boost EU economy, says Viktor Orbán - Europe live
item.description: Hungary’s prime minister is at a Belgium summit with other EU leaders this morning Bulgarian president Iliana Yotova , in an attempt to quell the coun...

item.title: Kim Jong Un chooses teen daughter as heir, says Seoul
item.description: South Korea's spy agency says Ki Ju Ae's prominent public presence indicates she is the chosen heir.

item.title: UK economy grew by 'subdued' 0.1% at end of 2025
item.description: Manufacturing was the main driver of growth during the final three months of the year, official figures show.

item.title: GB's Weston in prime position to win skeleton gold
item.description: Matt Weston underlined his status as the world's best skeleton pilot by setting the track record on his way to taking a significant halfway lead at th...

item.title: Don't sack cabinet secretary until Mandelson files published, Badenoch says
item.description: Head of the Civil Service Sir Chris Wormald is understood to be negotiating an exit package from his job.

item.title: 'The man to beat!' - GB's Weston smashes track record to lead skeleton
item.description: Team GB's Matt Weston smashes the skeleton track record and becomes "the man to beat" with two runs left to race at the Winter Olympics 2026.
